---
name: verify-debug-loop
description: Use when implementation quality is uncertain and the task needs iterative verify-debug-fix cycles until explicit pass criteria are met.
---

# Verify Debug Loop

Use this skill when reliability matters more than speed.

## Primary behaviors
- Define concrete pass/fail criteria before running checks.
- Run verification, triage failures, and apply focused fixes.
- Repeat until blocking issues are closed or clearly bounded.
- Report residual risks and missing coverage explicitly.

## Trigger examples
- "先验证再修，直到通过"
- "这个 bug 反复出现，做个系统排查"
- "给我一个可复现、可验证的修复闭环"
